revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-7-095 

A converter that provides one or more voltages or currents, each of which is maintained within specific limits.


Note: The French term alimentation regulee refers to a stabilised power supply unit in which the stabilisation of voltage is made by feedback.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Stabilised power supply (unit)}}
